2606.17915.title: Trustworthy Self-Composable Big-Data-as-a-Service: An LLM-Orchestrated Multi-Agent Framework for Automated Data Engineering, AutoML, MLOps Deployment, and Drift-Aware Lifecycle Optimization
2606.17915.paper_summary: Big-Data-as-a-Service (BDaaS) platforms require re liable automation across data ingestion, cleaning, feature engi neering, model development, deployment, and post-deployment monitoring. However, existing LLM-based data science agents and AutoML systems mainly focus on isolated workflow stages, leaving limited support for lifecycle-level orchestration, artifact governance, human oversight, and drift-aware adaptation. This paper proposes a trustworthy self-composable BDaaS frame work based on LLM-orchestrated multi-agent collaboration. The proposed architecture decomposes the BDaaS lifecycle into specialized agents for data ingestion, data cleaning, feature engineering, AutoML training, model evaluation, MLOps de ployment, monitoring, and drift detection. A central LLM or chestration layer coordinates agent execution, validates interme diate outputs, manages workflow context, and enables dynamic workflow composition. The framework also incorporates shared artifact governance, reproducibility support, human-in-the-loop checkpoints, and drift-aware feedback loops. A prototype-based evaluation is conducted using controlled tabular benchmark datasets with missing values, categorical variables, outliers, class imbalance, and simulated covariate drift. Compared with manual ML, AutoML-only, and single-agent LLM baselines, the pro posed multi-agent BDaaS pipeline achieves competitive predictive performance while improving lifecycle-level reliability, including workflow completion, artifact traceability, deployment readiness, reproducibility, and drift recovery. The results suggest that LLM-orchestrated multi-agent systems can extend conventional AutoML toward trustworthy, adaptive, and production-oriented BDaaS lifecycle automation.
2606.17915.paper_summary_zh: 大型數據即服務（BDaaS）平台需要在數據攝取、清理、特徵工程、模型開發、部署和部署後監控等方面進行可靠的自動化。<lb/>然而，現有的基於大型語言模型（LLM）的數據科學代理和自動機器學習（AutoML）系統主要集中在孤立的工作流程階段，對於生命周期級別的協調、工件治理、人類監督和漂移感知適應的支持有限。<lb/>本文提出了一個基於LLM協調的多代理協作的可信自組合BDaaS框架。<lb/>所提議的架構將BDaaS生命周期分解為專門的代理，負責數據攝取、數據清理、特徵工程、自動機器學習訓練、模型評估、MLOps部署、監控和漂移檢測。<lb/>一個中央的LLM協調層協調代理執行，驗證中間輸出，管理工作流程上下文，並實現動態工作流程組合。<lb/>該框架還納入了共享工件治理、可重複性支持、人類參與的檢查點和漂移感知反饋循環。<lb/>使用具有缺失值、類別變量、異常值、類別不平衡和模擬協變量漂移的受控表格基準數據集進行原型評估。<lb/>與手動機器學習、自動機器學習僅和單代理LLM基準相比，所提議的多代理BDaaS管道在提高生命周期級別的可靠性方面取得了競爭性的預測性能，包括工作流程完成、工件可追溯性、部署準備、可重複性和漂移恢復。<lb/>結果表明，LLM協調的多代理系統可以將傳統的自動機器學習擴展到可信、適應性強和面向生產的BDaaS生命周期自動化。
2606.17915.author: Aueaphum Aueawatthanaphisut et.al.
